Class LandSlot

java.lang.Object
model.Slot
model.LandSlot
public class LandSlot extends Slot
Represents a purchasable land property on the board. Extends Slot and includes price, group, and owner. Handles rent calculation and ownership transfer.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class Slot

    name, slotNumber
